Items.Title: Carlo Ancelotti issues Neymar and Raphinha injury update before Scotland clash
Items.Description: Brazil boss Carlo Ancelotti has provided an update on the fitness of Raphinha, who was forced off through injury against Haiti, and Neymar after the Selecao romped to a 3-0 victory in Philadelphia

Items.Title: World Cup still waits for real Brazil to show up
Items.Description: While rivals Argentina and France have impressed in the United States, Brazil have struggled to hit top form - despite a 3-0 win over minnows Haiti.

Items.Title: Cunha scores twice as Brazil beat Haiti
Items.Description: Manchester United forward Matheus Cunha scores twice as Brazil comfortably beat Haiti - who become the first team to be eliminated from the 2026 World Cup.

Items.Title: 365Scores Brasil
Items.Description:
